name: Large Enterprise Manufacturing (DACH)
description: Manufacturing and industrial enterprises with 1,000-80,000 employees and EUR 500M-100B revenue in DACH.

tam.source: IDC 2025 — manufacturing is the second-largest vertical for cloud adoption in Europe, with approx. EUR 28B in cloud infrastructure and platform spend driven by Industry 4.0 and SAP S/4HANA migration

sam.source: Germany alone has ~1,200 manufacturing enterprises above EUR 500M revenue; DACH total market for managed cloud + SAP migration + hybrid infrastructure estimated at EUR 6.2B based on ~22% DACH share of European manufacturing IT spend

som.description: 40 customers x EUR 3M ACV in 3 years
som.source: Bottom-up: ~400 qualifying DACH manufacturers with active SAP landscapes; T-Systems SAP Platinum Partner status gives access to ~25% = 100 addressable accounts; 40% conversion target = 40 customers; blended ACV EUR 3M (SAP-on-cloud hosting EUR 1.5M/yr + migration project EUR 1-2M) = EUR 120M
